name: O Sorbet D'amour SA
summary: O Sorbet D'amour SA provides homemade ice creams and sorbets in France. It offers frozen desserts, meringues with caramel chips, salted butter cr√É¬®me caramel, nut brittle hearts, crepes, waffles, and hot and cold drinks. The company was founded in 1935 and is headquartered in La Teste, France.
